vision.body: To Harness the inherent talent of individual learner for quality life
welcome.heading: Welcome to Wekan Kasarani School
welcome.body: At Wekan Kasarani School, we believe every child has the potential to excel. Nestled in the heart of Mwiki, Kasarani, our school provides a nurturing environment where academic excellence meets holistic character development. Our dedicated team of educators works tirelessly to unlock the unique gifts in every learner. We are proud to offer quality education through Kenya's Competency Based Curriculum (CBC), preparing our pupils for the challenges and opportunities of the 21st century.

values.heading: Our Virtues
values.subheading: The principles that guide our learning community
values.excellence.desc: We set high standards and inspire every learner to achieve their best.
values.integrity.desc: We build honest, responsible citizens of good character.
values.community.desc: We foster a warm, inclusive family atmosphere for all.
values.innovation.desc: We embrace modern learning approaches aligned with CBC.
values.love.desc: We foster a loving environment where every learner feels valued and cared for.
values.patience.desc: We approach every learner with patience, understanding each child's unique pace.
values.humility.desc: We cultivate humble hearts that are open to learning and growing together.
values.care.desc: We care deeply for the well-being of every child, family, and staff member.

curriculum.title: Curriculum
curriculum.subtitle: World-class CBC education from Pre-Primary to Junior Secondary
curriculum.overview.heading: About Our Curriculum
curriculum.overview.body: Wekan Kasarani School implements Kenya's Competency Based Curriculum (CBC), introduced by the Kenya Institute of Curriculum Development (KICD). CBC moves beyond rote memorisation to develop learners' competencies, values, and attitudes — equipping them with 21st-century skills.
curriculum.levels.heading: Learning Levels
curriculum.cbc.heading: Understanding CBC
curriculum.cbc.body: The Competency Based Curriculum focuses on nurturing seven core competencies: Communication & Collaboration, Critical Thinking & Problem Solving, Creativity & Imagination, Citizenship, Digital Literacy, Learning to Learn, and Self-Efficacy. At Wekan Kasarani, we bring these to life through inquiry-based learning, group projects, and real-world activities.
